inputs.label: Speed (m/s)
inputs.businessContext: Speed value in meters per second to be converted to kilometers per hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed value in meters per second to be converted to kilometers per hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metre/saniye cinsinden hız değeri, kilometre/saat'e dönüştürülecek.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschwindigkeitswert in Metern pro Sekunde, umgerechnet in Kilometer pro Stunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de vitesse en mètres par seconde à convertir en kilomètres par heure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de velocidad en metros por segundo a convertir a kilómetros por hora.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة السرعة بالمتر في الثانية ليتم تحويلها إلى كيلومتر في الساعة.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Fixed conversion factor from m/s to km/h (1 m/s = 3.6 km/h). Default 3.6.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed conversion factor from m/s to km/h (1 m/s = 3.6 km/h). Default 3.6.
businessContext_i18n.tr: m/s'den km/h'ye sabit dönüşüm faktörü (1 m/s = 3.6 km/h). Varsayılan 3.6.
businessContext_i18n.de: Fester Umrechnungsfaktor von m/s in km/h (1 m/s = 3,6 km/h). Standard 3,6.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion fixe de m/s en km/h (1 m/s = 3,6 km/h). Par défaut 3,6.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión fijo de m/s a km/h (1 m/s = 3.6 km/h). Por defecto 3.6.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل الثابت من م/ث إلى كم/س (1 م/ث = 3.6 كم/س). القيمة الافتراضية 3.6.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktının yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Rundung des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi du résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

inputs.label: Rounding Method
inputs.businessContext: 0 = normal rounding, 1 = floor, 2 = ceil. Determines how the output is rounded.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 = normal rounding, 1 = floor, 2 = ceil. Determines how the output is rounded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 = normal yuvarlama, 1 = taban, 2 = tavan. Çıktının nasıl yuvarlanacağını belirler.
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 = normale Rundung, 1 = Abrunden, 2 = Aufrunden. Bestimmt, wie die Ausgabe gerundet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 = arrondi normal, 1 = plancher, 2 = plafond. Détermine comment la sortie est arrondie.
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 = redondeo normal, 1 = suelo, 2 = techo. Determina cómo se redondea la salida.
businessContext_i18n.ar: 0 = تقريب عادي، 1 = تقريب لأسفل، 2 = تقريب لأعلى. يحدد كيفية تقريب الناتج.

inputs.label: Expected Output (Optional)
inputs.businessContext: Optional manual validation value to compare with computed output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional manual validation value to compare with computed output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan çıktı ile karşılaştırmak için isteğe bağlı manuel doğrulama değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optionaler manueller Validierungswert zum Vergleich mit der berechneten Ausgabe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de validation manuelle optionnelle pour comparer avec la sortie calculée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de validación manual opcional para comparar con la salida calculada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة تحقق يدوية اختيارية للمقارنة مع الناتج المحسوب.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
